userStories.title: Spec.md schema + parser + validator (cintura do duplo diamante)
userStories.description: Define schema canônico do spec.md (5 seções obrigatórias + 1 opcional upstream) em Zod. Spec.md é a cintura imutável entre Diamond 1 (Entender) e Diamond 2 (Construir). Parser + validator + CLI.
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/forge/spec/schema.ts exporta SpecSchema (Zod) com 5 seções obrigatórias + 1 opcional (upstream)
parseSpec(path: string): Spec lê .md → AST
src/lib/forge/spec/validator.ts: validateSpec(path) retorna { ok, errors[], spec? }
scripts/forge/cli.ts ganha subcomando 'spec validate <path>' que exit 0 se ok, 1 se errors
Erros incluem line:col da seção que falhou
Spec exemplo em docs/specs/example.md passa validação
Spec com seção upstream apontando pra DS/PRD/meeting é aceita (refs tipadas)

userStories.title: Iter-0 planner reuse-first (spec → stories.jsonl via plan-mode)
userStories.description: Função planner(spec): discovery-pass reuse-first via Agent(Explore) ANTES de plan-mode. Cada story sai com reuses:[paths]. Detecta ciclo. Rejeita >30min. Consulta ForgeLearning (D22) se existir.
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/forge/planner.ts exporta plan(specPath): Promise<{stories, dag, reuseMap}>
Stories válidas conforme StorySchema
Cada story tem campo reuses[] (vazio se green-field)
Discovery-pass invoca Agent Explore antes do plan-mode (verificável no transcript jsonl)
Detecta ciclo no dependsOn e retorna erro com lista de ids no ciclo
Estimate > 30 vira erro com nome da story
CLI 'forge plan <slug>' invoca e grava em .forge/<slug>/plan.jsonl

verifiable.command_or_query: node scripts/forge/cli.js plan example && cat .forge/example/plan.jsonl | jq '.[0].id'

userStories.title: Migration — ForgeSpec table + ForgeTask new fields + cost agg
userStories.description: 4 migrations atômicas conforme §7. Roda via psql DIRECT_URL. Regenera database.types.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: supabase/migrations/20260530a_create_forge_spec.sql aplicado, tabela ForgeSpec existe
supabase/migrations/20260530b_forge_task_engine_fields.sql adicionou specId, agentProfile, worktreePath, dependsOn, verifiable, passes em ForgeTask
supabase/migrations/20260530c_forge_run_cost_agg.sql adicionou costUsdTotal, tokensInTotal, tokensOutTotal, specId em ForgeRun
supabase/migrations/20260530d_forge_cost_aggregate_trigger.sql criou trigger funcional
supabase/migrations/20260530f_forge_privacy_rls.sql aplicado, RLS de Forge* tables agora usa ownerId match (D24)
src/lib/supabase/database.types.ts contém ForgeSpec + novos campos
RLS smoke: usuário A não consegue SELECT em ForgeRun de usuário B (privacy ownerId)

verifiable.command_or_query: SELECT count(*) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name='ForgeSpec'
SELECT count(*) FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='ForgeTask' AND column_name IN ('specId','agentProfile','worktreePath','dependsOn','verifiable','passes')

userStories.title: Orchestrator TS local com pivot detection (substitui ralph.sh)
userStories.description: Node CLI service local. Workers paralelos (maxConcurrency=3), merge serializado, pivot detection (D21): após 2 falhas consecutivas na mesma story, pausa run + gera pivot-required.md.
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/forge/orchestrator.ts exporta runOrchestrator({specId, maxConcurrency=3})
Lock pid em .forge/<run-id>/orchestrator.pid impede 2 instâncias
Pick task: ready (passes=false, deps todos passes=true) + lex order como tiebreak
Merge serializado: enquanto worktree A faz merge, worktree B espera
Falha de task incrementa failureCount; 2 falhas consecutivas → status='paused-pivot' + pivot-required.md gerado
Pivot report inclui: story id, AC, anti-patterns detectados, sugestão (pivot na spec OR scope creep)
SIGINT graceful: termina workers ativos, marca status='aborted'

verifiable.expected: lista de tasks a executar, sem spawnar

userStories.title: Worker spawn via Agent + isolation worktree (detached process)
userStories.description: spawnWorker(task) usa Claude Code Agent tool com isolation='worktree' e subagent_type por agentProfile. Worktree: .forge/<run-id>/tasks/<task-id>/worktree. Branch: forge/<run-id>/<task-id>. Spawn detached + unref pra sobreviver page reload (D27).
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/forge/worker.ts exporta spawnWorker(task: ForgeTask): Promise<WorkerResult>
Worktree criado em .forge/<run-id>/tasks/<task-id>/worktree antes do spawn
Branch nomeado forge/<run-id>/<task-id> criado limpo de joao-dev
Após commit no worktree, é mergeable em joao-dev sem conflito interno
Falha de worker remove worktree mas preserva log em error.log

verifiable.expected: list contains worktree paths after a test run

userStories.title: Subagent profiles + anti-patterns (db/api/ui/wiring/test/doc)
userStories.description: Cada profile injeta memories, skills, constraints + lista de anti-patterns (D20). Verifiable check pós-story faz grep no diff por cada anti-pattern severity='block'.
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/forge/profiles/index.ts exporta getProfile(name): Profile
Cada profile tem: systemPrompt, allowedTools[], requiredMemories[], antiPatterns[], maxRetries
UI profile antiPatterns inclui: '<Dialog ' (sem ResponsiveSheet), 'window.confirm', setState após fetch (regex)
DB profile antiPatterns inclui: 'prisma migrate', migration sem RLS, ALTER sem migration atômica
API profile antiPatterns inclui: validação Zod fora de api/, response sync pra LLM/job >1s
Worker resultado falha se anti-pattern severity='block' detectado no diff
UI profile prompt menciona explicitamente: ResponsiveSheet, Field, useOptimisticCollection
DB profile prompt menciona: psql DIRECT_URL, atomic migrations, RLS via helpers

userStories.title: Hooks emitem ForgeEvent dual-track (SSE local + Supabase upload)
userStories.description: Hook escreve em .forge/<run>/events.jsonl (Track 1 SSE local) + watcher faz upload batch pro Supabase ForgeEvent (Track 2 audit). Route /api/forge/runs/[id]/stream serve SSE via fs.watch.
acceptanceCriteria: .claude/hooks/forge-event-emit.ts existe e registrado em .claude/settings.json
Hook escreve linha jsonl com { runId, taskId, ts, kind, payload } em .forge/<runId>/events.jsonl
src/lib/forge/event-uploader.ts: watcher chokidar batch upload (10 evs ou 200ms) pro Supabase
src/app/api/forge/runs/[id]/stream/route.ts implementa SSE via fs.watch no events.jsonl local
SSE response chunks formato 'data: {jsonEvent}\n\n'
Idempotência: re-upload no-op via UNIQUE constraint
Sem run ativo: hook é no-op (não falha)

verifiable.command_or_query: SELECT count(*) FROM "ForgeEvent" WHERE "runId" = (SELECT id FROM "ForgeRun" ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC LIMIT 1)

userStories.title: Cost tracking via stream-json output
userStories.description: Worker invoca claude -p com --output-format=stream-json. Parser extrai tokens + calcula USD via pricing table. Persistido em ForgeTask, agregado em ForgeRun via trigger.
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/forge/cost-parser.ts exporta parseCost(stream): Promise<CostSummary>
Pricing table em src/lib/forge/pricing.ts com Opus/Sonnet/Haiku 4.x
Worker resultado inclui { cost: { tokensIn, tokensOut, usd } }
Após cada task, ForgeTask.costUsd persistido via DAL
Trigger SQL agregou ForgeRun.costUsdTotal corretamente

verifiable.command_or_query: SELECT "costUsdTotal" FROM "ForgeRun" WHERE id=(SELECT "runId" FROM "ForgeTask" WHERE "costUsd">0 LIMIT 1)

userStories.title: CLI surface (forge init/plan/run/ps/kill/done)
userStories.description: scripts/forge/cli.ts com subcomandos via commander.js: init, plan, run, ps, kill, done.
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/forge/cli.ts compila via tsc
package.json bin: { forge: 'scripts/forge/cli.js' }
Cada subcomando responde a --help
`forge ps` mostra tabela com run id, slug, progress, cost, eta
`forge done` invoca gh pr create com título correto

userStories.title: Forge UI dual-source (SSE local + Supabase fallback) em /projects/[id]/forge
userStories.description: SSESource via EventSource API + SupabaseRealtimeSource + auto-detect. UI tenta SSE primeiro, fallback Supabase se SSE 404. Forge mora em /projects/[id]/forge (aba do projeto, D30). Privacy ownerId (D24).
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/forge/sources/sse.ts implementa ForgeSource via EventSource
src/lib/forge/sources/supabase.ts implementa ForgeSource via realtime postgres_changes
src/lib/forge/sources/index.ts auto-detect: tenta SSE primeiro, fallback Supabase
Backfill SSE: leitura .forge/<run>/events.jsonl direto ≤ 100ms
Backfill Supabase ≤ 500ms pra runs com ≤ 1000 eventos
Wifi off por 5s (modo Supabase) reconnect sem duplicar seq
Toggle manual ?source=mock|sse|supabase funciona pra debug
Rota /projects/[id]/forge (aba do projeto) usa o source automático e respeita RLS ownerId

userStories.title: TaskSheet ganha aba Diff
userStories.description: 4ª aba na TaskSheet. Mostra git diff acumulado da worktree. Fetch via GET /api/forge/tasks/:id/diff que lê do worktree (running) ou do commit (done).
acceptanceCriteria: src/app/(dashboard)/forge/_components/task-sheet/diff-tab.tsx existe
GET /api/forge/tasks/[id]/diff retorna { patch: string, files: string[] }
Para task running: 'git -C <worktreePath> diff joao-dev...HEAD'
Para task done: 'git show <commitSha>'
Aba só aparece se task.status != 'queued'

userStories.title: Next.js dispatch routes (ping + run) + UI run button
userStories.description: Conecta UI à execução local (D27): GET /api/forge/ping (200 em dev, 404 em prod) + POST /api/forge/runs (spawn detached). Botão 'Run with Forge' no sprint board só renderiza se ping=200. Badge 🟢/🔵 no header.
acceptanceCriteria: src/app/api/forge/ping/route.ts retorna 200 + { dev: true } em dev mode
src/app/api/forge/ping/route.ts retorna 404 em prod (NODE_ENV check)
src/app/api/forge/runs/route.ts POST recebe { taskId }, valida ownership, spawna detached, retorna { runId }
Orchestrator detached sobrevive a pnpm dev restart (smoke: ps -p após reload)
Botão 'Run with Forge' no sprint board só renderiza se /api/forge/ping = 200
Header global mostra badge 🟢/🔵 baseado em ping (polling 5s)

userStories.title: ForgeLearning — persistência de aprendizados cross-spec
userStories.description: Tabela ForgeLearning (slug, lesson, profileScope, addedAt, severity). Worker grava via tool record_learning. Planner consulta antes de spawnar workers; profile worker recebe learnings relevantes inline no system prompt.
acceptanceCriteria: supabase/migrations/20260530e_forge_learning.sql cria tabela com RLS por createdBy/projectId
src/lib/forge/dal/learning.ts: recordLearning(lesson) e listLearnings(profileScope) funcionais
Worker tem tool 'record_learning' no allowedTools de cada profile
Planner injeta learnings.length > 0 ? 'KNOWN PITFALLS:\n...' : '' no prompt
Após 2 runs no mesmo profile, learning de run 1 aparece no prompt do run 2

verifiable.command_or_query: SELECT count(*) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name='ForgeLearning'

userStories.title: Closeout — branch merge + gh pr create + spec move
userStories.description: `forge done <run-id>` implementa rito 4: valida passes=true em todas, merge branches em ordem topológica, move spec, push 2 remotes, gh pr create, marca run done.
acceptanceCriteria: Função closeout(runId): Promise<{prUrl, mergedTasks[]}>
Erro se alguma task passes=false (lista quais)
Após sucesso, spec move pra done/ com timestamp
PR URL retornado é acessível via gh api
CLI 'forge done <id>' executa todos os steps com confirmação
